name: Banga
intro: Unlike palm oil, which is also extracted from palm fruit, palm fruit juice is extracted at a much lower temperature and contains a mix of oil and water. Banga spice mix is also available from African grocery stores or online and often contains a combination of ataiko, ighreje, aidan, omilo and more. The soup can be served with most swallows and can also be served with boiled rice.

ingredients.item: and 1/2 tablespoons ground Banga spice mix
1/2 cup chopped scent leaves or basil (optional)

method: Pour the palm fruit concentrate and water into a large pot and bring to a boil. Cook on medium heat for 8-10 minutes, stirring occasionally.

Add the meat alternatives of your choice, onions, seaweed, chilli powder, Banga spice mix, vegetable stock, ogiri and salt to taste. Cook for 5 minutes then add the chopped scent leaves/basil and cook for another 2 minutes.
Serve the soup hot with a swallow of your choice, such as eba (garri), pounded yam, fufu or semolina.
